title: Anstore 24 Pack Colour Plastic Baby Hangers, Extendable Nursery Hangers, Children Coat Hangers with Space-Saving Stackable Hooks, Non-Slip Toddler Hangers for Kids Children Clothes Dresses
features: 【Colourful Hangers】:The package includes 24 pcs colourful hangers, 6pcs in each colour, which include beige, green,pink and blue.Value combination, very cost-effective, enrich baby's wardrobe color.

【Extendable Buckle Design】: These plastic kids hangers are designed with extendable buckle on the shoulders, the length can be adjusted from 29cm in to 37cm,so they can hang all size clothes from newborn to 12 years.

【Space-saver Design】: Cute bear hook allows stacking hanging, to make full use of vertical space.Hang multiple clothes together to maximize your closet and save space in the closet.The small side hooks can be used for strappy tops, skirts, etc.

【Non-slip Design】:These children clothes hangers with non-slip grain on the shoulder area to prevent the clothes from slipping and scratching.The shoulder of these hangers adopt a curved design as a whole, fit the curve of the human body, and ease the hanging.

【Safe and Durable】 :Durable and Secure: These baby clothes hangers are made with non-toxic and environmentally friendly PP plastic, safe for baby.The high quality plastic for strong flexibility and more durable.The edge is of the hanger is smooth without burr, so it won't scratch the clothes.
description: Product Description Anstore Retractable Baby Clothes Hangers, Accompany the Baby's Growth ! With our extendable nursery hangers, you do not need to buy different hangers size when your baby grow faster and faster. The adjustable arms of baby hangers move from 29cm in to 37cm, so adjustable baby hangers will fit all sizes from new birth to 12 years. These plastic baby hangers can create a neat and orderly wardrobe , also great for sorting laundry, hanging wet clothes... Feature: Brilliant colors, cute little bear hanger, baby's favorite. Safe materials, strong and durable. From babies to kids, adjust the retractable hanger with age. Stacking design, saving space and more practical. Specifications: Colors: Pink,Beige,Blue,Green Material: New PP Size: Length: 29-37cm/11.4-14.57 inch Height: is 17.5cm/6.89 inch Thickness:0.5cm/0.2 inch Net weight: ≥46g Packing: 6 pieces in a bundle, each fixed with a paper card, and then put into the carton together Note:The product size is manually measured, if there is an error of 1-2cm, please refer to the actual product size.
